name: Set of 5 Zippered Pouch Organizers - up&up™: Clear Multicolored Storage Bags, Universal Packing Cubes, PEVA Material
description:
Organize documents, accessories and other items conveniently with this Set of 5 Zippered Pouch Organizers from up&up. This pack of five pouch organizers come in assorted colors with five different sizes, all featuring a translucent design to make it easy to identify the contents. Made with plastic, these pouches close with zippers to help keep the contents neatly contained.

up&up™: We believe making smart choices for the people, places, and pets in your life should be easy and affordable. And, having quality you can trust should be a given. That’s why you can count on our promise – caring for your everyday in every way.

Satisfaction guaranteed – Love it or your money back.
